title: Paper clay sculpted owl
notes: A standing owl approximately 120 mm tall. Body is a pinched oval, wings are slab pieces pressed against the body. Face is modelled with pinched eye discs and a small pushed beak. Feet are two coil logs flattened and scored on. Tail extends at the base for stability. Paper clay reduces cracking at thin joints. PVA sealed and left natural white, or painted with acrylics for realism.
